phase3_findings.description: cloud-setup.md anchor link does not resolve to its heading (GitHub strips . and / with no hyphen)
describe-plugin-compose.sh unknown-read-outcome (*) arm has no driving test
annotation runs after entries spliced and || true swallows a describe failure -> unlogged splice
'There is no non-zero path' overstates guarantee; add trailing exit 0
'trusted base ref' generalized to all three tiers imprecise for write tiers
plugin@name may not resolve if marketplace.json name differs from settings key

fix_decisions.claim_text: annotation || true swallows describe failure -> unlogged splice into credentialed runner
fix_decisions.evidence: over-grade shape 2 (diagnostic-only: composed plugin surface is always correct — entries come from the trusted source; only an advisory ::notice:: audit line is lost) + shape 3 (uncorroborated single-source from empirical over-grader silent-failure-hunter, no Phase-2 FAIL, no other agent). describe-plugin-compose.sh always exits 0 by contract so the swallow requires a corrupted describe copy. The recommended fix (drop || true) would violate the helper's own 'a compose annotation never breaks the run' contract, so calibrated rather than applied.

fix_decisions.claim_text: plugin@name may not resolve if target marketplace.json name differs from settings key
fix_decisions.evidence: real but minor; install-time resolution is outside this compose step's visibility, docs already note an uninstallable-entry probe. Suggestion, below fix threshold.
fails closed by design (grep absence short-circuits && -> _compose_ok=0 -> rank-2/baseline). Confirmed fail-closed; no change needed.

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty (grades committed HEAD) — resolves post-commit / runs in CI

stale_prose_check.rows: no STALE rows at post-fix HEAD

test_first_gate.command: copy-based mutation of the * arm to silent
test_first_gate.evidence: REAL script PASS (warning present); MUTATED copy RED (mutation caught) — behavioral, not vacuous

fix_delta_gate.evidence: blinded gate verified all 4 fixes correct (anchor slug, non-vacuous arm test, safe exit 0, true reworded doc)

sweep_evidence.note: fix delta was doc-anchor + test-add + trailing exit-0 + doc-clarity; §2.3 always-on prose/coupled-mirror sweeps applied to the delta — docs mirrors (cloud-setup/overview) and the run.sh pin checked; no code-logic change introduced
